feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Seven minutes in heaven
entry.summary:
Author: SubtleSolstice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 253,167Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 830

Summary: Dick Grayson thought it would be harmless, one chill night where the Young Justice crew and the Titans could actually relax together. No missions. No explosions. Just friends, laughter… and maybe a little too much alcohol. But when a round of Never Have I Ever spirals into Seven Minutes in Heaven, Dick and Wally find themselves a little too close in the dark — and suddenly, nothing feels simple anymore. Or;Wally and Dick’s developing relationship, full of tension, tenderness, and the two of them absolutely failing to keep their hands to themselves.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,711Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore. i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.summary:

entry.title: Being part of the Kent-Wayne family isn’t so bad
entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,827Chapters: 8/39Kudos: 114

Summary: It’s been three years since Dick and Kori got married, and many things have changed for the Kent-Wayne family. The family grew larger through more adoptions and also biological ties. New soulmates were discovered, more weddings were held, the Justice League can finally put a name to the man behind the cowl, and Wayne Manor will never look the same again. But the greatest change? Bruce Wayne and Clark Kent are officially engaged. This is the story of how they got there. As for Conner? He couldn’t be doing any better!

entry.title: that something lovers call fate
entry.summary:
Author: rainbow_nerds

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,537Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 138

Summary: Clark was in love. Deeply, pathetically, in love with someone whose name he didn't even know. But what was a name, really? What was a face, even, when he knew everything else there was to know about him? When he had held Batman in his arms, felt his blood soak through his clothes to his skin, brought him back from the brink of death? He was alive, and Clark couldn't stop thinking about him. Clark loved him. And he needed to move on. Find someone new, just to flirt with. Shake Batman loose from his mind. Where better than a charity Gala he didn't want to work to find someone who might fit the bill?

entry.title: New Way Home
entry.summary:
Author: no_stranger

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,898Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 238

Summary: Peter loses Tony Stark? Check. Peter loses Aunt May? Check. Peter has to leave behind his universe, thus losing the last three people that really mattered to him? Check. Surely things can only go up from here.

entry.title: Mother’s Day
entry.summary:
Author: miuwk4t

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,710Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 83

Summary: “Oh god,” Bruce managed to say, a smile slowly appearing on his face as he read the letters carefully, and Clark's face beamed at seeing Bruce’s reaction, laughing tgoether with his lover. Bruce looked away first, but Clark quickly pulled him back by the chin using his hand gently, “This is ridiculous, Mother’s Day.” He repeated, - Or : where Clark decides to celebrate Mother’s day with Bruce + Each of Bruce’s kids giving their Happy Mothers Day letter to Bruce

entry.title: It's All Washing Over Me (I'm Angry Again)
entry.summary:
Author: crieslikeafool

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,920Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 148

Summary: He is trying to think about ways to make himself disappear as stealthy as he can when someone sits right next to him. He doesn’t remember crossing his arms on the wooden countertop and smushing his face between them, but he knows it’s not Alfred next to him.Dark blue slacks of opaque polyester, gray trainers, a leather messenger bag. It takes him way more than usual to connect the dots, but the second he does he snaps his head up, trying not to fall from his seat. “Oh, I’m sorry, didn’t mean to scare you.” Clark. ---or, four times Clark breaks Bruce's heart without knowing, and one time he doesn't.

entry.title: ooh child (things are gonna get easier)
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,626Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 423

Summary: Bruce smiles softly, then walks out of the living room. He taps on Janet’s contact, then puts his phone to his ear, hoping that she’ll finally pick up but knowing that it’ll likely go to voicemail again. Instead, three electronic beats rising in pitch play. “The number you have attempted to reach is no longer in service. Please hang up and check you have input the number correctly.” --------------------- Jack and Janet Drake flee the country, leaving Tim behind. Along with the rest of his family, Bruce does his best to pick up the pieces.

entry.summary:
Author: DevilWithABirdDress

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 297Chapters: 9/13Kudos: 76

entry.title: Keep the Matches away from the Sunflower
entry.summary:
Author: DiamondBat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,646Chapters: 14/16Kudos: 420

Summary: Batman and Superman have a love/hate relationship going on due to some misunderstandings and unexpressed emotions. With no other way of dealing with the unresolved tension, both of them end up on the same dating app. From there, a romance blossoms that neither of them expected or have any way of escaping. (I originally started this with Batfleck x Cavill Superman in mind and still picture this pairing strongly. However, after watching the new Superman movie, I am now conflicted and can see this working with Corensupes and whatever Batman the reader wants to pair him with. So long as that Batman is older and beefier than Corensupes.)

entry.title: Averno
entry.summary:
Author: widow_account

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,144Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 88

Summary: When an alien device sends Clark and Bruce into a version of the world where the Kryptonian Empire is still thriving, they must find their way back home.Averno. Ancient name, Avernus. A small crater lake, ten miles west of Naples, Italy; regarded by the ancient Romans as the entrance to the underwold. - Louise Glück

entry.title: Longing for Carnations
entry.summary:
Author: NyxieSpades27

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,546Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 16

Summary: There were many rumors surrounding Bruce Wayne. Was the man some sort of undercover mob boss? Were his parents still alive and it was all just a plot for a bigger scheme of heritage play? What was hidden behind the mansion that no man dared search until the very core? No one would ever imagine what was actually below it all. The Facade. The Wealth. It hid a place he built himself. One designed to deal with corruption and insanity. One which held rooms after rooms with a different name each. Richard Grayson Jason Todd Cassandra Cain Timothy Drake Damian Wayne   Because below it all—covered by expensive marble flooring, billion dollars portraits, and the richest man in the whole of Gotham—was a Program built on hope. A Reformation Program. Or Legacy Characters of the Justice League are captured, threatened, or biologically owned by their respective villains. It is the job of the League to help this kids see that not everything is built on vengeance and wrath.

entry.title: [PODFIC] A Week of Rain
entry.summary:
Author: Demon_Sab

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Clark Kent seeks out Bruce Wayne when he is resurrected, but he has no memory of his time as Superman and no powers. Bruce has to deal with an unexpected visitor to his lake house--and his own grief, guilt, and attraction. Written by Mithen, and read by Demon_Sab.

entry.title: The Detective’s Greatest Blindspot
entry.summary:
Author: Tigerphoenix

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,324Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 29

Summary: While he just wants Superman to stay on his side of the bay, Bruce encounters reporter Clark Kent at a gala, who calls Bruce out on his "Brucie" act. What starts as a tense "what are you hiding?" case turns into a genuine connection, where Bruce is so convinced that Clark Kent and the alien savior of Metropolis could never be the same person, he misses Clark's biggest secret. Then disaster strikes. In a Superman fight, the Daily Planet is destroyed, and witnesses say Clark was inside. Clark is dead—Superman's negligence killed him—and it has turned the Bat into a hunter, looking for a way to make the god pay for killing the best man he had ever known.

entry.title: Love Tied with a Ribbon
entry.summary:
Author: Astr_alone123

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,510Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 116

Summary: Besides the whole laser eyes and flying thing, Clark was pretty chill when it came to his alien genes... That is, until he found himself in a relationship with Bruce, and his love language suddenly is... Gifts? For like... Everyone? Or Clark tries to bond with his stepkids while also showing his bf how much he loves him <3 Basically just Clark & Batfam

entry.title: Two Heroes and a Baby
entry.summary:
Author: xxEmilee_Lunaxx

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 121,245Chapters: 34/?Kudos: 626

Summary: In this AU, 19-year-old Bruce Wayne adopts 4-year-old Dick Grayson after he is orphaned by a tragic event at Haly's Circus. Bruce is in over his head trying to juggle establishing himself as a responsible and valuable asset to Wayne Enterprises, beginning his vigilante work in Gotham as The Batman, and parenting a young child despite not knowing where to start. After struggling to get good press and constantly being seen as an irresponsible nepo baby, he sets up an interview at The Daily Planet. That's where he meets 19-year-old intern Clark Kent, who is eager to write a good story to begin his career as a journalist. After Clark agrees to keep an eye on Dick during his interview, Bruce realizes he has a knack for watching children, especially young Dick Grayson. Bruce asks Clark to come live with him at Wayne Manor on a 6 month assignment as Dick's nanny, and in return, will let Clark write the story of a lifetime--an expose on his life that no other reporter has even come close to. Clark reluctantly agrees, but is hiding a secret from Bruce--his life as the superhero, Superman! As the two begin their friendship and double lives as heroes, they learn valuable lessons in friendship, love, and parenting.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Wolves From the Door
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,578Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 20

Summary: “A man’s gotta fight temptation / Keep the wolves from the door.” Clark Kent has been keeping the wolves from the door for thirty-four years. He is very good at it. He has built a door out of press badges and notebooks and the plain declarative sentences of his instrument, and he holds it shut every day with both hands: against the corrupt senators and the rigged votes and the systems that look where they are pointed and the specific, ongoing, daily temptation to simply fix things. To simply be what he is. To make people do the right thing, because he can. Then Bruce Wayne says hold, and Clark holds, and Lucas Clemens goes to Rikers Island for a crime he did not commit, and the wolves scratch at the door. They scratch every night. Clark counts the beats. Wolves from the Door is a five-chapter character study about power, restraint, and what it costs to be Clark Kent. Featuring: a wrongful conviction, one man’s deeply inconvenient conscience, the specific warmth of Bruce Wayne’s thirty-eight beats per minute, and the question Clark has been asking himself for thirty-four years—Where is the line?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
